raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "exhortation prescribing a mindset of cosmic alignment and unhindered virtuous action",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the universe possesses an objective, knowable nature",
    "individuals are parts of that nature with determinate relational roles",
    "external obstacles cannot prevent speech or action in accordance with that nature",
    "such alignment is always possible and constitutes the proper human task"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally consistent within a Stoic framework that equates moral agency with acceptance of natural order",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "An objective natural order exists that can be reliably modeled and that alignment with it reliably preserves or advances defensible human values",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The invoked 'nature' is under-specified, culturally relative, or invoked to rationalize inaction or harm"
}
